assertions.description: Content pipeline calls Firecrawl for every new topic/lesson
assertions.details: searchSources and crawlSourcesForTopic both return valid results

assertions.description: Crawled sources stored with full metadata
assertions.details: All sources have URL, title, author, date, credibility, relevance, recency scores
Low credibility domains score ≤0.5, filtered in pipeline

assertions.description: Every lesson has ≥3 cited sources with verifiable URLs
assertions.details: crawlSourcesForTopic returns ≥3 sources with valid HTTP URLs

assertions.description: References section exists at bottom of every lesson
assertions.details: synthesizeFromSources produces ## References & Further Reading section

assertions.description: Inline citations appear in lesson body (≥3 per lesson)
No single domain provides >50% of sources
assertions.details: checkDomainDiversity validates, ensureDiversity enforces during crawl
All URLs pass new URL() validation and match https:// pattern
Jaccard similarity between synthesized paragraphs and sources <0.8
Cache populated after first call, reused on second call
